visual_base.visual_narrative_log: (1) Two young women, one wearing a white lacy dress and a blue beret and the other in a black top, stand in a bright Costco warehouse aisle. They are positioned next to a 'Giant Plinko Game' board. (2) A close-up focuses on a blue plastic disc being dropped into the top of the peg-filled board. The camera pans down to track the disc's descent toward the numbered slots. (3) The disc lands in the '0' slot. The women react with expressive facial movements and laughter, gesturing towards the board. (4) An insert shot shows a price tag for the 'GIANT PLINKO GAME' listed at $2,599, clearly displaying product details. (5) One woman holds up a blue disc and drops it again while the other watches. They continue their animated interaction in front of the warehouse shelves. (6) The video concludes with a series of quick cuts showing the women laughing and the game board in use, maintained in a bright, industrial indoor setting.
visual_base.text_narrative_log: (1) [Logo]: COSTCO WHOLESALE. [Subtitle]: 爸爸要給的零用錢是. [Variety]: 2599元值得買嗎?. [Variety]: 超大型彈珠遊戲台. (2) [Variety]: 0元. (3) [Slogan]: 大型彈珠遊戲台. [Variety]: $ 2,599. (4) [Subtitle]: 爸爸媽媽要發零用錢給小朋友用這個. (5) [Subtitle]: 老闆要發零用錢也是可以拿這個. (6) [Subtitle]: 寶寶只要洗完碗就可以玩一次. [Variety]: 就可以玩一次. [Variety]: PLINKO. (7) [Subtitle]: 你的零用錢是. (8) [Variety]: 0元. (9) [Subtitle]: 槓龜王欸 他是槓龜王耶. (10) [Subtitle]: 貢丸 我是貢丸.

visual_human_presence.countingEvidence: 2 main female creators appearing throughout the video.
visual_human_presence.mainCharacterDescription: One woman wears a white sleeveless lacy dress and a blue beret; the other wears a black top with shoulder cut-outs.

visual_scene_and_style.backgroundDescribe: A typical Costco warehouse interior with high ceilings, industrial shelves stocked with various packaged goods, and bright overhead lighting.

audio_base.audio_narrative_log: (1) High-pitched, energetic female narration starts over a bright, rhythmic electronic pop BGM. A resonant 'ding' SFX marks the start of the game. (2) Upbeat synth textures continue. A second female voice joins with frequent laughter. A cartoonish 'slide' sound effect follows the descending disc. (3) A celebratory but comedic jingle plays as the disc hits the zero slot. The voices engage in loud, overlapping laughter and rapid-fire commentary. (4) Narration speed increases while discussing humorous use cases. Transient 'whoosh' and 'pop' SFX are used for editing transitions. (5) The mix remains dense with vocal banter and high-energy music, concluding with a final laughing outburst and a sharp audio cut.

narrative_and_purpose.narrativeStructure: List-based: Intro -> Demonstration -> Comedic Outcome -> Practical/Humorous Advice.
narrative_and_purpose.mainPurpose: To showcase a unique and expensive giant Plinko game found at Costco in a humorous way, suggesting various life scenarios where it could be used for rewards or allowance distribution.

high_inference.freeDescribe: A highly engaging short-form video utilizing typical social-native editing tropes like reaction laughter, high-frequency text overlays, and upbeat BGM.
